metadata.description: Agent Skills by emerose, distributed as Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: bibliographer
plugins.description: Manage a personal collection of academic articles: add papers from a DOI/arXiv/PMID/PMCID/S2 id or a PDF (auto-fetching metadata from Crossref, arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, and Unpaywall), file PDFs into a human-readable author tree, bulk-import a folder, recover metadata for unverified scans, search inside the papers, browse via a generated HTML viewer, and audit the library. Built on libkit.

plugins.name: scientist
plugins.description: Manage a tree of scientific experiments end to end as one provenance-tracked pipeline raw→data→analysis→claims: extract raw measurements from CRO files (Excel, GraphPad Prism, Word/PDF/PowerPoint) into tidy deterministic data/ CSVs; re-derive analysis (EC50/Hill fits, stats, summaries, figures); assert grounded scientific claims (each a re-runnable pytest spec linking a statement to sha-pinned evidence with a strength); and index everything — claims and summaries first — into a libkit store for semantic + full-text search, with an end-to-end traceability audit from any claim back to the original measurements. Built on libkit.
